name: wormholes-smoke-tests
description: Non-user-facing smoke, storage, performance, accessibility, and long-session tests for the Wormholes static app.

scripts.test: npm run test:parallel && npm run test:storage-heavy
scripts.test:headed: npm run test:parallel:headed && npm run test:storage-heavy:headed
scripts.test:desktop: npm run test:parallel:desktop && npm run test:storage-heavy:desktop
scripts.test:xss: npm run test:xss:unit && npm run test:xss:sanitizer && npm run test:xss:inputs && npm run test:xss:app
scripts.test:malformed-imports: node unit/malformed-import-regressions.unit.js && playwright test -c playwright.storage.config.js e2e/malformed-import.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop
scripts.test:bridge-map: node unit/bridge-map-regressions.unit.js && playwright test -c playwright.config.js e2e/bridge-map-operations.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop
scripts.test:dialog-keyboard: node unit/dialog-keyboard-lifecycle.unit.js && playwright test -c playwright.config.js e2e/dialog-keyboard-lifecycle.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop
scripts.test:malicious-inputs: node unit/malicious-input-paths.unit.js && playwright test -c playwright.storage.config.js e2e/malicious-input-paths.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop
scripts.test:xss:inputs: node unit/malicious-input-paths.unit.js && playwright test -c playwright.storage.config.js e2e/malicious-input-paths.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop
scripts.ci:performance: node unit/performance-ci.unit.js && npm run perf:ci:node && npm run perf:ci:browser
scripts.test:csp: node unit/trust-boundaries.unit.js && node unit/content-security-policy.unit.js && playwright test -c playwright.config.js e2e/content-security-policy.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop --workers=1
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run check:shared-modules && npm run check:runtime
scripts.test:release:cross-browser: playwright test -c playwright.cross-browser.config.js --grep "uploads Literature and Vision Board files through browser storage" --workers=1
scripts.ci:release:critical: npm run test:indexeddb-fallback && npm run test:literature-lifecycle && playwright test -c playwright.config.js e2e/smoke.spec.js e2e/persistence-error-messages.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop --workers=1 && WORMHOLES_EXPECT_RELEASE_METADATA=true npm run test:build-diagnostics
scripts.ci:security: npm run ci:security:csp && npm run ci:security:xss && npm run ci:security:inputs && npm run ci:security:sanitization && npm run ci:security:urls && npm run ci:security:imports
scripts.test:xss:required: npm run test:xss:unit && npm run test:xss:sanitizer && npm run test:xss:app
scripts.test:url-hardening: node unit/url-link-hardening.unit.js && playwright test -c playwright.storage.config.js e2e/url-link-hardening.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop --workers=1
